name: guardrail-ai
description: Enterprise-grade agentic middleware providing real-time compliance oversight, FINRA verifiable auditing, and hits-in-the-loop Veto Protocols.
author: Guardrail Security Inc.

guardrail-governance.description: Dynamically loads permitted agentic tools based on context and evaluates them against regulatory interceptors.

install.instructions: Run '/plugin marketplace add guardrail-ai/sentinel-node' to integrate the middleware into your Claude environment.
